package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesTolowerEqualfold() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_tolower_equalfold"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.Equal(bytes.ToLower(...), bytes.ToLower(...))` instead of `bytes.EqualFold(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
